'''Nativum''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] changed their plans — instead of attacking Nativum, they changed to [[Azure/Legends|Azure]].

{{Planet-stub}}

*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{Mo}}
